scripts.build: yarn workspace @teamplay/utils build && yarn workspace @teamplay/schema build && yarn workspace teamplay build
scripts.test: yarn workspace babel-plugin-teamplay test && cd packages/teamplay && npm run test
scripts.test-types:dist: yarn build && yarn workspace teamplay test-types:dist
scripts.publish-patch: yarn build && dotenv -- npx lerna publish patch --conventional-commits --create-release=github
scripts.publish-patch-force: yarn build && dotenv -- npx lerna publish patch --force-publish --conventional-commits --create-release=github
scripts.publish-breaking-minor: yarn build && dotenv -- npx lerna publish minor --conventional-commits --create-release=github
scripts.publish-alpha-breaking-minor: yarn build && dotenv -- npx lerna publish preminor --force-publish --preid alpha --dist-tag alpha
scripts.publish-alpha-patch: yarn build && dotenv -- npx lerna publish prerelease --preid alpha --dist-tag alpha

hooks.pre-commit: ! grep -q '"resolutions":' ./package.json || (echo '\033[0;31mError: "resolutions" found in package.json. Remove "resolutions" to proceed with commit.\033[0m' && exit 1) && lint-staged && npm test
